name: white_space_widget
title: White Space Removal Tutorial
description: Learn how to remove white space and blank pages from PDFs

steps.text:
📁 Add PDFs to Optimize

Select PDF files that contain unnecessary white space or blank pages that you want to remove for cleaner documents.

📂 Bulk Processing

Need to process many files? Use Scan Directory to add all PDFs from a folder at once. Perfect for cleaning up document archives!

📋 Files to Process

Your PDFs are listed here. The tool will analyze each file for white space and blank pages to remove. You can drag to reorder or select specific files.

🗑️ Remove Selected Files

Changed your mind about some files? Select them in the list and click here to remove them before processing.

✂️ Remove White Space

Process your PDFs to remove blank pages and unnecessary white space, creating cleaner, smaller files. Great for reducing file sizes and removing scanner artifacts!
